# KC Shah & Associates

Welcome to KC Shah & Associates. We are a premium Chartered Accountancy firm in Mumbai offering Zoho Books outsourcing, business valuation (IBBI), company incorporation, GST compliance, virtual CFO & audit services for startups and SMEs.

## Core Pages
- [Home](https://kcshah.com/)
- [About Us](https://kcshah.com/about.html)
- [Contact](https://kcshah.com/contact.html)
- [Insights / Blog](https://kcshah.com/blog.html)

## Services
- [Zoho Books Outsourcing](https://kcshah.com/zoho-books-outsourcing.html)
- [Zoho Books Implementation](https://kcshah.com/zoho-books-implementation.html)
- [Business Valuation](https://kcshah.com/business-valuation.html)
- [Virtual CFO](https://kcshah.com/virtual-cfo.html)
- [Company Incorporation](https://kcshah.com/company-incorporation.html)
- [GST Filing Services](https://kcshah.com/gst-filing.html)
- [Income Tax Filing](https://kcshah.com/income-tax.html)
- [Audit & Assurance](https://kcshah.com/audit-assurance.html)
- [Corporate Finance](https://kcshah.com/corporate-finance.html)
- [FEMA & RBI Compliance](https://kcshah.com/fema-compliance.html)
